channel.title: XKey Updates
channel.description: XKey - Vietnamese Input Method for macOS

item.title: Version 1.2.22 (Build 20260601)
item.description:
What's New

fix(engine): correct adaptive English-detection + add adaptive tests

Adaptive mode flips vInputType per keystroke (digit -> VNI, else -> Telex), so

it reflects only the last key. The whole-buffer English-detection validated the

mixed Telex+VNI raw buffer against that single type, which could misjudge VNI

sequences when a trailing letter flipped the type back to Telex. Flag a buffer

as English only when it is impossible under BOTH Telex and VNI.

Also fix the (currently unreachable) InputProcessor.adaptive routing to send

digits through VNI instead of Telex-only, so it stays correct if revived.

Tests: VNI-typed multi-syllable word not disabled as English, English word stays

literal under the both-tables check, and VNI remove-tone (0) works in adaptive

across both conventions.

Xem chi tiết trên GitHub
